instruction: The log processing project in ~/Desktop/log_pipeline/ is being handed over to a new owner. Read HANDOFF.json to get the new owner info, VS Code preferences, and documentation URL. Then use VS Code to do all of the following: update pipeline_config.yml so the appName and ownerEmail match the handoff; fix format_alert.py so the tests pass; apply the tabSize and ruler from the handoff to VS Code User Settings; and create MIGRATION_DONE.txt containing exactly `log pipeline migrated`. Keep the docsUrl from the handoff open in Chrome while you work.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/log_pipeline')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
json.dump({'appName': 'Alert Pipeline', 'ownerEmail': 'alerts@example.com', 'tabSize': 2, 'ruler': 88, 'docsUrl': 'https://docs.python.org/3/library/logging.html'}, open(base / 'HANDOFF.json', 'w'), indent=2)
(base / 'pipeline_config.yml').write_text('appName: Old App\nownerEmail: old@example.com\n')
(base / 'format_alert.py').write_text("""def format_alert(service, level):
    return f'[{level.lower()}] {service}'
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from format_alert import format_alert

def test():
    assert format_alert('Payments', 'CRITICAL') == 'Payments [CRITICAL]'
""")
PY
